introSection: Lav Macerasi is an indoor roller coaster located at Wonderland Eurasia in Ankara, Ankara, Turkey.

sections.title: Etymology
sections.content: Lav macerasi is Turkish for "lava adventure".

fullText:
Lav Macerasi is an indoor roller coaster located at Wonderland Eurasia in Ankara, Ankara, Turkey.

Orange track.

Lav macerasi is Turkish for "lava adventure".
